---
title: "Simulation Studies for Methodological Research: State of the Art, Issues, and Potential Solutions"
author: "Björn Siepe"
date: "2026-07-01"
categories: [Simulation Studies, Open Science, Metascience]
image: "simstudies.png"
engine: knitr
comments: false
license: "CC BY"
execute:
  freeze: true
description: "Invited talk at FU Berlin, University of Münster Conference of the DGPs Methods and Evaluation Section 2025, and Simulation Lunch Lectures Series 2026."
cv:
  pdf1: "Muenster_Kolloquium25-Siepe.pdf"
  pdf2: "FU_Kolloquium25-Pawel-Siepe.pdf"
  pdf3: "FGME_Talk_Siepe.pdf"
  pdf4: "Sim-Lunch-Lectures-Siepe-2026.pdf"
---

The manuscript associated with the talk is available was published in [Psychological Methods](https://psycnet.apa.org/doi/10.1037/met0000695); an accepted version is available at [PsyArxiv](https://osf.io/preprints/psyarxiv/ufgy6/).

```{css echo=FALSE}
.embed-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 100%;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 100%;
}
.embed-container iframe,
.embed-container object,
.embed-container embed {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 80%;
    height: 80%;
}
```


Find the slides for the Lunch Talk Series here:

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf4`" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download PDF Slides
  </a>
</p>
<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf4`" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```

Find the slides for the FGME conference here:

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf1`" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download PDF Slides
  </a>
</p>
<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf3`" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```

Find the slides for Münster here:

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf1`" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download PDF Slides
  </a>
</p>
<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf1`" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```

Find the (very similar) slides for Berlin, given together with Samuel Pawel, here:

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf2`" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download PDF Slides
  </a>
</p>
<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf2`" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```
